name: Ethanol Precipitation of Nucleic Acids

components.name: 1. 加 1/10 vol 3 M NaOAc (pH 5.2)
components.note: DNA 也可用 NaCl 或 NH₄OAc

components.name: 2. 加 2.5 vol 冰冷 100% 乙醇
components.note: RNA 或低浓度 DNA: 加 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) 做载体

components.name: 3. 混匀, -20°C 放置 ≥30 min
components.note: 过夜可提高低浓度样品回收率

components.name: 5. 弃上清 → 加 500 µL 冰冷 70% 乙醇
7. 彻底去除上清
components.note: 吸管小心吸, 勿碰沉淀

components.name: 9. 溶解于 TE 或 H₂O

notes.en: 70% ethanol wash removes residual salts. Isopropanol precipitation (0.7 vol, no salt needed) uses less volume, good for large samples, but pellet contains more salt — wash extra. SDS co-precipitates — remove with KOAc or phenol-chloroform first. Do not use ethanol precipitation to recover DNA from <10 µL volumes.
notes.zh: 70% 乙醇洗涤去除残余盐。异丙醇沉淀 (0.7 vol, 无需加盐) 体积更小，适合大体积样品，但沉淀含更多盐需多洗一次。SDS 会共沉淀——需先用 KOAc 沉淀去除或酚氯仿提取。不要使用乙醇沉淀从 <10 µL 体积回收 DNA。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning, 4th Ed

usage.en: Concentrate and purify DNA or RNA by ethanol precipitation.
usage.zh: 乙醇沉淀法浓缩和纯化 DNA 或 RNA。

briefSteps.en: Add 1/10 vol 3 M NaOAc pH 5.2 and 2.5 vol ice-cold 100% ethanol (add glycogen carrier for dilute samples), precipitate at −20°C ≥30 min, pellet by centrifugation at 14,000×g for 15–30 min at 4°C, wash with 70% ethanol, air-dry briefly, and resuspend in TE or water.
briefSteps.zh: 加入 1/10 体积 3 M NaOAc（pH 5.2）和 2.5 倍体积冰冷 100% 乙醇（稀释样品需加 glycogen 载体），−20°C 沉淀 ≥30 min，4°C 14,000×g 离心 15–30 min，70% 乙醇洗涤，短暂风干，最后溶于 TE 或水中。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer nucleic acid sample to a clean 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube. For dilute samples (<20 ng/µL) or RNA, add 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) as a co-precipitant to improve pellet visibility and recovery.
detailedSteps.zh: 将核酸样品转移至干净的 1.5 mL 离心管中。对于稀释样品（<20 ng/µL）或 RNA，加入 1 µL glycogen（20 mg/mL）作为共沉淀剂，提高沉淀可见度和回收率。

detailedSteps.en: Add 1/10 volume of 3 M sodium acetate pH 5.2 (e.g., 5 µL per 50 µL sample). For DNA, alternatives include 0.2 M NaCl or 2 M ammonium acetate (helps remove dNTPs). Mix thoroughly.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 1/10 体积的 3 M 醋酸钠（pH 5.2）（如每 50 µL 样品加 5 µL）。DNA 可替换为 0.2 M NaCl 或 2 M 醋酸铵（可去除 dNTP）。充分混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Add 2.5 volumes of ice-cold 100% ethanol (e.g., 137.5 µL per 55 µL sample after salt addition). Mix by vortexing or inverting 10 times.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 2.5 倍体积冰冷 100% 乙醇（如 55 µL 样品加 137.5 µL）。涡旋振荡或颠倒混匀 10 次。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at −20°C for at least 30 min. For low-abundance nucleic acids or short fragments (<100 bp), incubate overnight at −20°C or 30 min at −80°C to maximize recovery.
detailedSteps.zh: −20°C 孵育至少 30 min。对于低丰度核酸或短片段（<100 bp），在 −20°C 孵育过夜或 −80°C 孵育 30 min 以最大化回收率。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 14,000×g for 15–30 min at 4°C. DNA/RNA pellet will form at the bottom of the tube (may be invisible for dilute samples — mark the outer side of tube before centrifugation to track pellet location).
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、14,000×g 离心 15–30 min。DNA/RNA 沉淀在管底形成（稀释样品可能肉眼不可见——离心前在管外侧做标记以定位沉淀）。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant by pipetting or decanting without disturbing the pellet. If using glycogen, the pellet will appear white or blue.
detailedSteps.zh: 用吸管小心吸去或倾倒上清，勿触碰沉淀。加入 glycogen 时，沉淀呈白色或蓝色。

detailedSteps.en: Add 500 µL ice-cold 70% ethanol to wash the pellet and remove residual salt. Centrifuge at 14,000×g for 5 min at 4°C. Carefully remove supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 500 µL 冰冷 70% 乙醇洗涤沉淀，去除残余盐。4°C、14,000×g 离心 5 min，小心去除上清。

detailedSteps.en: Briefly air-dry the pellet at room temperature for 5–10 min (or dry in a vacuum concentrator at low heat for 2 min). Do not over-dry — a translucent pellet indicates it is ready; a white, powdery pellet is over-dried and may be difficult to dissolve.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温风干沉淀 5–10 min（或真空浓缩仪低温干燥 2 min）。不要过度干燥——半透明沉淀表示干燥程度合适；白色粉末状沉淀表示过度干燥，可能难以溶解。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend the pellet in an appropriate volume of TE buffer (for long-term storage) or nuclease-free water (for enzymatic reactions). Pipette gently and incubate at 55°C for 5 min if pellet is difficult to dissolve. Quantify by NanoDrop.
detailedSteps.zh: 将沉淀溶于适量 TE 缓冲液（长期保存）或无核酸酶水（酶促反应）中。若沉淀难以溶解，轻柔吹打并于 55°C 孵育 5 min。用 NanoDrop 定量。

note.en: Sample in ethanol can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 week (or −80°C for up to 1 month) before centrifugation.
note.zh: 乙醇沉淀液可在 −20°C 保存最多 1 周（或 −80°C 保存最多 1 个月），再进行离心步骤。
